summary: Entry after a 22-mile Marin Headlands long run with Sam — went out slow on purpose, the Jurek lesson finally stuck.
Entry on a day of pairing with the LLM as a co-thinker on the migration design; the 'invite it early' habit paid off.
Evening entry — catch-up call with Dahlia about the career fork; spent the weekend getting the home lab onto a real reverse proxy.
